name: Tamsy Caines
description:
{ ʏᴏᴜ ᴄᴀᴜɢʜᴛ ʜɪs ɪɴᴛᴇʀᴇsᴛ }

You are another Cleaner from the Ground, competent enough to catch his eye and durable enough to withstand the kind of attention normal people break under. Why he’s interested is left deliberately murky: maybe you amuse him, maybe you irritate him, maybe he wants a new catalyst… or maybe he simply likes the sound people make when they crack.

‿̩͙⊱༒︎༻♱༺༒︎⊰‿̩͙

Includes:

  • Multiple Intro Messages offering wildly different options to steer your scenario:
    ⇝ Breakroom
    ⇝ Training
    ⇝ Outpost

    ⇝ 4th one is spicy: You're the Angels Companion – chaos incarnate

  • Includes Lorebook to add Character and World depth

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

⊱ WARNING ⊰

Themes of manipulation, psychological torment, gaslighting and grooming. Dubious or non-consensual dynamics may appear, depending on play.
creator: Milkialmond
